title: Australian Shattering Meat Pie
description: A classic Australian meat pie with a twist of coriander. Perfect for a cold winter's night.
instructions: In a large pan over medium-high heat, cook the ground beef until browned, breaking it up into small pieces as it cooks.
Add the onion and garlic to the pan and cook until the onion is translucent.
Stir in the coriander and cook for 1 minute.
Add the beef stock to the pan and bring to a simmer.
Reduce the heat to low and let the mixture simmer for 10 minutes.
Stir in the breadcrumbs and cook for a further 2 minutes.
Transfer the mixture to a pie dish and bake for 20-25 minutes, or until the filling is hot and the crust is golden brown.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh coriander if desired.
